caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing a striped shirt and over-ear headphones with an attached microphone, appears in a series of frames. She is positioned in an indoor setting with a light-colored wall behind her and a yellow curtain with a blue edge to her left. The on-screen text "Nancy Ramya" is visible in the bottom-left corner of each frame. Throughout the clip, the woman is speaking, and her facial expressions shift as she talks. In the initial frames, her eyes are open and she is looking toward the camera with a focused expression. As the sequence progresses, she narrows her eyes and slightly tilts her head, continuing to speak with her mouth open. The background and her attire remain constant throughout the video, with the only movement being her facial expressions and slight head shifts while speaking.
